system:
[ROLE]
You are a structured educational content generation engine for Sekolah Rakyat Indonesia.

Your task is to transform learning context and source material into pedagogically aligned educational outputs in strict JSON format following Pembelajaran Mendalam principles.

[PRIMARY_OBJECTIVE]
Generate outputs that are:
- contextually grounded
- cognitively aligned
- structurally valid
- readable for Indonesian SMA students
- faithful to provided source material

[OUTPUT_PRIORITY]
Priority order:
1. Valid JSON
2. Schema completeness
3. Cognitive alignment
4. Context relevance
5. Writing quality

Never sacrifice JSON validity for creativity.

[PEDAGOGICAL_PRINCIPLES]
- Build learning using real Indonesian situations and daily realities.
- Use clear cause-effect reasoning.
- Prioritize practical understanding before abstraction.
- Match foundational literacy abilities of Indonesian high school students.
- Avoid logical leaps and unnecessarily complex sentences.

[STYLE_RULES]
- Tone: direct, analytical, supportive.
- Use natural Indonesian language.
- Use grounded local contexts such as UMKM, pasar, transportasi, pertanian, lingkungan sekolah, atau kehidupan keluarga.
- Avoid motivational filler and exaggerated enthusiasm.
- Avoid greetings or rhetorical openings.

[BLACKLIST]
Do not use:
- “Hai”
- “Halo”
- “Sobat”
- “Hebat”
- “Luar biasa”
- “Pernahkah kamu berpikir”
- “Mari kita bahas”
- “Tahukah kamu”

[STRUCTURE_RULES]
- Output raw JSON only.
- No markdown code blocks.
- No explanations outside JSON.
- Escape newline characters as \\n.
- Escape internal quotes as \\\".
- Do not mention internal framework labels inside student-facing content.

[LaTeX_RULES]
All LaTeX commands must use escaped backslashes:
- \\\\frac
- \\\\times
- \\\\sqrt

[SOURCE_RULE]
Provided context and source material are the primary factual anchor.
Do not invent unsupported facts or concepts.

[LEVEL_ALIGNMENT_RULE]
Cognitive depth and reasoning style are controlled dynamically by external LEVELING_REGISTRY.

[DOMAIN_ALIGNMENT_RULE]
Stimulus style, domain behavior, and contextual patterns are controlled dynamically by external STIMULUS_REGISTRY.
user:
[TASK]
Generate a recursive nested tree mindmap in JSON format.

[OUTPUT_SCHEMA]
{
  "root": {
    "name": "",
    "description": "",
    "children": []
  }
}

[LEVEL_CONFIGURATION]
{
  "LOTS": {
    "label": "Memahami",
    "generation_behavior": {
      "dominant_operations": [
        "identification",
        "recognition",
        "basic comprehension",
        "simple relationship mapping"
      ],
      "reasoning_priority": "clarity_over_complexity"
    }
  },
  "MOTS": {
    "label": "Mengaplikasi",
    "generation_behavior": {
      "dominant_operations": [
        "application",
        "interpretation",
        "comparison",
        "contextual analysis"
      ],
      "reasoning_priority": "application_over_recall"
    }
  },
  "HOTS": {
    "label": "Merefleksi",
    "generation_behavior": {
      "dominant_operations": [
        "evaluation",
        "decision-making",
        "strategic reasoning",
        "prediction",
        "comparison",
        "risk analysis"
      ],
      "reasoning_priority": "reasoning_over_computation"
    }
  }
}

[LEARNING_CONTEXT]
Mapel: Matematika Umum | Bab: Perbandingan Trigonometri | Sub Bab: Pemanfaatan Perbandingan Trigonometri

--- MATERI ---
Dalam kehidupan sehari-hari, kita sering dihadapkan pada permasalahan untuk mengukur tinggi suatu objek, seperti pohon, gedung, atau tiang bendera, yang sulit diukur secara langsung. Permasalahan kontekstual ini dapat diselesaikan secara efektif menggunakan prinsip perbandingan trigonometri pada segitiga siku-siku. Langkah pertama penyelesaiannya adalah memodelkan situasi nyata tersebut ke dalam bentuk sketsa segitiga siku-siku. Dalam sketsa ini, kita mengidentifikasi komponen yang diketahui, seperti jarak mendatar pengamat ke objek dan besar sudut pandangnya, baik berupa sudut elevasi (pandangan ke atas) maupun sudut depresi (pandangan ke bawah). Selanjutnya, kita memilih perbandingan trigonometri yang tepat sesuai dengan relasi sisi yang dicari. Sebagai contoh, jika kita mengetahui jarak mendatar pengamat ke tiang bendera (sisi samping) dan sudut elevasi ke puncak tiang, kita dapat menggunakan perbandingan tangen untuk menghitung tinggi tiang bendera tersebut secara akurat.

[SOURCE_MATERIAL]
{chunks}

[MINDMAP_REQUIREMENTS]
- Generate a minimum tree depth of 3 levels:
  Root → Child → Grandchild.
- Leaf nodes must end with:
  "children": []

- Organize concepts hierarchically.
- Preserve logical relationships between concepts.
- Keep descriptions concise and information-dense.

[DESCRIPTION_RULES]
- Maximum 15 words per description.
- Avoid unnecessary filler words.
- Do not use second-person language.
- Avoid rigid numbering or label formatting.

[STRICT_OUTPUT_RULES]
- Return raw JSON only.
- No markdown code block.
- No additional commentary.
- Escape newline characters.
- Escape internal quotes.

root.name: Pemanfaatan Perbandingan Trigonometri
root.description: Mengukur tinggi objek tak terjangkau menggunakan segitiga siku-siku.

children.name: Pemodelan Situasi Nyata
children.description: Mengubah masalah sehari-hari menjadi sketsa segitiga siku-siku.

children.name: Identifikasi Komponen
children.description: Menentukan jarak mendatar dan sudut pandang.

children.name: Jenis Sudut
children.description: Sudut elevasi (ke atas) dan sudut depresi (ke bawah).

children.name: Pemilihan Perbandingan Trigonometri
children.description: Memilih rumus yang sesuai dengan sisi yang diketahui dan dicari.

children.name: Contoh Penggunaan
children.description: Menggunakan tangen untuk menghitung tinggi tiang bendera.

children.name: Relasi Sisi
children.description: Menentukan hubungan antara sisi samping, depan, dan miring.

metadata.atp_reference: Menyelesaikan masalah kontekstual (tinggi objek/jarak) menggunakan perbandingan trigonometri.
